{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''My'' voice is the people's voice. My guild and I have always decided what is good for all, and...|Brylin|<ref name="SW88" />}}
'''Brylin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as Spokesman for the ruling [[Herdessan Guild]] on his home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Herdessa/Legends|Herdessa]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] climactic [[Battle of Endor/Legends|defeat]] at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], Brylin led the Herdessan Guild in meeting with a delegation from the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] to establish formal diplomatic relations. Arrogant in the Herdessan Guild's control of the world and an enthusiastic participant in the Herdessan practice of [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]], Brylin and his confederates instead took Alliance leader [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], intending to deliver her and the world to an Imperial remnant force. However, fellow Alliance diplomat [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] led an armed Herdessan revolt that overthrew the Herdessan Guild's power and toppling Brylin's scheme.<ref name="SW88" />
